[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Fix batch mode UX: support all QR input methods (camera, upload, list)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/223
  
  Details:
  Made batch mode work consistently across all three QR input sub-methods on report_inventory_movement.html. Previously batch mode was locked to 'Select from List' only — camera and upload couldn't accumulate batches. Also fixed: dropdown obscuring batch list on add, selected QR not transferring to batch on toggle, manager/item dropdowns misleadingly shown in batch mode, per-QR manager not used in submissions, and duplicate detection with feedback.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
